name: Apple Brandy Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring frequently.
3. Cook for about 15 minutes, or until the mixture begins to thicken.
4. Pour into hot sterilized jars, leaving 1/4 inch headspace.
5. Vacuum seal. Makes 6 1/2 pint jars.
